finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools — now extended with the append-only ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp) and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for immutable audit trails and billing workflow tracking. NOTE: stripe, tasks, and ledger backends were NOT connected on the live gateway at generation time — combos involving them are verified:false. Stripe tool names follow the @stripe/mcp surface and are plausible but unverified.

combos.name: invoice-to-ledger-tracker
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and write each into a Notion finance tracker database as a page — turning billing state into a queryable, human-readable ledger view.
combos.notes: stripe not connected (lazy); stripe/list_invoices inferred from @stripe/mcp surface. notion/API-post-page is verified.

combos.name: new-customer-onboarding-record
combos.accomplishes: Create a Stripe customer, log the customer record into Notion, and open a GitHub issue to track onboarding follow-up work — a three-backend chain spanning payments, docs, and engineering.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). notion/API-post-page verified. github not connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: payment-failure-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate failed/pending Stripe payment intents, reason over likely causes and remediation order with sequential-thinking, then record the triage plan as a Notion page.
combos.notes: stripe inferred. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: invoice-to-immutable-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and append each as an immutable entry to the ChittyLedger — creating an auditable, append-only financial record that cannot be altered after the fact.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp — in config (enabled:false). This is the core finance-immutability combo: Stripe is the source of truth for billing; the ledger is the durable audit anchor.

combos.name: billing-task-and-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Create a billing remediation task in ChittyAgent Tasks and simultaneously append a ledger entry recording the intent — so the task's existence is anchored in the immutable ledger before it can be lost or modified.
combos.notes: tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). Both are new apps/*-mcp surfaces — shortest cross-backend finance combo.

combos.name: ledger-to-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent ChittyLedger entries for a financial namespace, reason over them with sequential-thinking to identify anomalies or trends, and write a finance brief into Notion — turning raw ledger state into an actionable narrative.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified on the live gateway.

combos.name: financial-context-brief
combos.accomplishes: Search RAG evidence for financial and billing context (Chitty pricing docs, payment patterns, ledger policy), reason about implications and action items, create a structured finance brief in Notion — a useful fallback until stripe/ledger/tasks backends connect
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (evidence, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works as a research-only finance workflow until Stripe/ledger are connected. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: financial-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read financial documents or data exports from filesystem (CSV/JSON billing reports, ledger snapshots), reason about key metrics, anomalies, and action items, document structured summary in Notion
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works with locally-synced financial data files. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: local-finance-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read a local financial data file (CSV/JSON billing export, ledger snapshot, invoice list) and reason about key metrics, anomalies, and trends — a pure local workflow that works when financial data is already synced to disk.
combos.notes: Both tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/read_text_file (1.0 for read intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze/reason intent). No Notion/Stripe/ledger dependency — fully verified in remote container.

combos.name: multi-finance-doc-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search a directory for financial exports and reports (matching patterns like '*.csv' or '*invoice*'), batch-read all matches simultaneously, then synthesize cross-period insights and anomalies — useful for comparing monthly billing reports or aggregating audit exports.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/search_files (0.56 for search-files intent), fs/read_multiple_files (0.50 for read-multiple-files intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze intent). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: financial-page-brief
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a financial report page, dashboard, or investor doc as clean markdown via the browser-rendering service, reason over key data points, anomalies, and trends with sequential-thinking, then write a finance brief to a local file — useful for quickly digesting external financial data without manual extraction.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown (0.6 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). browser-rendering confirmed connected (toolCount: 3). Extends page-to-markdown-archive (ends at fs/write_file) with reasoning step. No auth-gated backends required NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: financial-page-screenshot-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Capture a screenshot of a financial dashboard or reporting page, analyze the visible financial indicators and chart data with reasoning, write a financial snapshot — captures visual dashboard state vs existing financial-page-brief which fetches as markdown.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot (0.33), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.40), fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: uses screenshot (visual) vs existing financial-page-brief which uses get_url_markdown NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. orchestrator/agent_search returned finance agent (0.7 relevance for 'finance banking mercury'); skill_search returned mercury-finance (0.8) and cashflow-planner (0.8) for 'cashflow finance'; skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; fs/write_file confirmed. First use of agent_search → skill_search → skill_execute in a single finance chain.

combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. evidence/list_rags returned 3 RAGs (chittyevidence-ksn, re-evidence-search, chittyevidence-search); evidence/ai_search with rag_id returned VERIFIED property evidence at trust 0.65; thinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Finance-specific variant of rag-aware-governance-report (governance profile).

Novel: skill_list + evidence pairing for finance.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: skill_list (54 real skills returned LIVE this session — includes chittyos-finance:mercury-finance, chittycommand-alpha:cashflow-planner, chittycommand-alpha:obligation-tracker), evidence/ai_search (0.48 score), thinking (confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). First combo pairing skill_list with evidence in the finance profile.

combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id (direct execute 2026-06-05, TypeScript resolved), context7/query-docs (cast score 0.80 confirmed), evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (direct execute confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). combos.accomplishes: Find the finance agent, survey available evidence RAGs for financial corpus, AI-search for specific financial data, discover relevant financial skills (cashflow-planner, mercury-finance), and reason over the combined financial landscape. Agent-entry finance chain — uses agent discovery as the entry point into evidence-driven skill routing.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: agent_search confirmed finance agent (finance.agent.chitty.cc, Mercury banking); evidence/list_rags (3 RAGs confirmed); evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow finance planning') returned real ROTH IRA cash flow data ($17/month, 12-month $204 rolling); skill_search('cashflow planner finance mercury') confirmed cashflow-planner (0.8) and mercury-finance (0.8); thinking confirmed. Novel: first finance chain to begin with agent_search → RAG survey → evidence → skill lookup (5-tool chain); prior finance chains skip agent entry or omit RAG survey.

combos.name: obligation-cashflow-evidence-plan
combos.accomplishes: Dual-skill discovery for financial planning: first surface the obligation-tracker skill to enumerate current financial/legal obligations, then the cashflow-planner skill for forecasting, cross-reference both against real RAG evidence data (ROTH IRA, account statements), then reason into a consolidated obligation-vs-cashflow plan and write it to a file.
combos.notes: obligation-tracker (0.8 relevance) and cashflow-planner (0.8 relevance) both confirmed via live skill_search. evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow finance planning ROTH') returned real ROTH IRA cash flow data ($17/month). Novel: first finance chain to use two sequential skill_search calls targeting distinct but related financial planning skills before pivoting to evidence — prior finance chains use a single skill_search.

combos.name: neon-agent-postgres-cashflow-schema
combos.accomplishes: Discover chittyagent-neon (Neon PostgreSQL ops — branch management, SQL execution, schema introspection) alongside chittyagent-finance (Mercury banking → Neon sync, cash flow, multi-entity), look up pg client documentation for the data access layer, enumerate available evidence RAGs to cross-reference financial documents, then reason into a cash-flow schema design brief bridging banking transactions and Neon schema shape.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. agent_search('neon database sql postgres schema migration') → chittyagent-neon (0.7, unbound, neon-sql+branch-management+schema-introspection); agent_search('finance banking neon transaction') → chittyagent-finance (0.5, bound, mercury-banking+transaction-sync+neon-sync); context7/resolve-library-id('pg') → /vitaly-t/pg-promise (confirmed, High reputation); evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs confirmed; thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: FIRST use of chittyagent-neon in catalog; first chain pairing neon agent + finance agent for schema-level cashflow design.

combos.name: token-ops-redirect-evidence-finance
combos.accomplishes: Discover the token-ops agent (chittyagent-token-ops), execute its status probe to surface auth routing info, then query evidence RAGs for financial data and synthesise a finance-auth ops brief — FIRST use of chittyagent-token-ops in a finance chain.
combos.notes: FIRST use of chittyagent-token-ops (25th-pass). agent_execute(token-ops,status) returns {action:'redirect',domain:'token-ops.agent.chitty.cc'} ✓. evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs ✓. evidence/ai_search → real financial data ✓. thinking ✓. fs/write_file ✓. All tools confirmed 2026-06-06.

combos.name: playwright-financial-page-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Use the interactive Playwright browser (handles auth, SPAs, JS-rendered dashboards) to navigate to a financial page, capture a full screenshot, reason about the data visible, and save the analysis to a local file — distinct from browser-rendering chains which are headless URL fetches only.
combos.notes: playwright, thinking, fs all confirmed connected (2026-06-06). Distinguishes from browser-rendering chains: playwright can interact with authenticated sessions and JS-heavy finance portals. twenty-seventh-pass.

combos.name: evidence-financial-patterns-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Perform a precise (non-AI) evidence keyword search for financial patterns or audit records, reason about the findings, and persist a summary page to Notion — uses evidence/search (exact query) rather than ai_search, giving deterministic retrieval useful when the query is well-specified.
combos.notes: evidence (3 tools), thinking, notion all confirmed connected (2026-06-06). Distinct from financial-context-brief which uses evidence/ai_search. twenty-seventh-pass.

combos.name: provision-status-then-billing-skill
combos.accomplishes: Check the current session's provisioning binding before executing a billing skill — ensures the correct financial-domain ChittyID entity is active before running payment or invoice operations, preventing misrouted financial tasks.
combos.notes: First use of orchestrator/provision_status in finance profile. All three tools confirmed on live orchestrator (2026-06-06 twenty-eighth-pass). Full chain: check who's bound → find billing skill by intent → execute it.

combos.name: financial-specialist-fork-execute
combos.accomplishes: Evaluate current ChittyID candidates for a financial session, fork the best-scored generalist into a finance-specialist context, then execute a billing/ledger skill against the newly forked specialist — bootstrapping a financial entity in one chain.
combos.notes: Novel pattern: evaluate → fork → execute without a manual bind step. All orchestrator tools confirmed live (2026-06-06). Useful when no dedicated financial entity exists yet.

combos.name: finance-agent-mercury-balances
combos.accomplishes: Find the chittyagent-finance (Mercury banking) via orchestrator, pull current entity balances, reason about cash flow health, and write a financial snapshot — a fully verified chain using the live finance agent.
combos.notes: chittyagent-finance is bound (domain: finance.agent.chitty.cc, capabilities: mercury-banking, transaction-sync, balance-query, cash-flow, multi-entity). Confirmed via agent_list 2026-06-06.

combos.name: neon-finance-agent-transaction-analysis
chain: orchestrator/agent_search(neon database finance banking neon sql)
combos.accomplishes: Route to the chittyagent-neon (Neon PostgreSQL ops agent), query financial transaction tables, reason about cash flow patterns across entities, and write an analysis — leveraging the Neon agent's schema-introspection capability.

combos.name: dispute-billing-ledger-chain
combos.accomplishes: Intake a financial dispute via the dispute agent's multi-domain lifecycle workflow, run an AI evidence search to surface relevant contracts or prior-case precedents, then log the resolved outcome to the finance agent's Mercury banking ledger — closing the billing dispute loop with verifiable, citable evidence.

combos.name: token-ops-finance-api-rotation
combos.accomplishes: Evaluate the current session's trust context for financial access, rotate stale ChittyAuth tokens for Mercury banking API connections via token-ops, then immediately query the finance agent to confirm live connectivity — the safest credential-rotation pattern with built-in liveness verification.

combos.name: cleaner-storage-financial-doc-audit
combos.accomplishes: Run the cleaner agent's AI-powered disk analysis over financial document directories to surface stale/redundant files; feed results to the storage agent to archive or legal-hold in R2; have the finance agent reconcile the cleaned doc set against current billing state — turning disk hygiene into financial audit coverage.
combos.notes: cleaner: bound (disk-cleanup, AI-powered). storage: unbound (R2 management, legal-holds). finance: bound (Mercury banking, multi-entity). Orchestrator meta-tools verified; agent tool dispatch unverified until storage reconnects.

combos.name: auth-token-ops-finance-access-chain
combos.accomplishes: Validate auth credentials through the auth agent, issue/rotate the required token via chittyagent-token-ops, then execute a finance operation (balance query, transaction sync) with the freshly validated access — a secure, three-agent token-gated finance flow.
combos.notes: auth: bound. token-ops: unbound (token-issuance, rotation, validation). finance: bound. Full chain requires token-ops reconnect; auth+finance are live.

combos.name: resolve-finance-billing-error-triage
combos.accomplishes: Route a billing error payload through chittyagent-resolve (severity classification, auto-resolution), query chittyagent-finance for transaction impact across Mercury entities, then write a documented triage report to Notion — closing the loop from error alert to financial audit.
combos.notes: resolve (bound, 0 tools but routes via orchestrator), finance (bound, 0 tools), notion/API-post-page verified. Chain routes through orchestrator MCP surface.

combos.name: market-skill-install-finance-plugin
combos.accomplishes: Discover a finance-domain plugin in ChittyMarket, resolve its skill ID via orchestrator/skill_search, then invoke chittyagent-finance to activate it — a three-step marketplace install-to-activate flow for financial tooling.
combos.notes: market (bound), skill_search (live orchestrator tool), finance (bound). orchestrator connected and verified.

combos.notes: helper+canon both bound; orchestrator connected; notion/API-post-page connected

combos.name: intel-finance-cash-flow-analysis

combos.name: alchemist-finance-pattern-report
combos.accomplishes: Alchemist observes which cross-backend finance patterns recur across sessions (e.g. agent_execute(finance) → thinking → fs/write combinations) and routes to the finance agent for live Mercury account state context, then records the emerging alchemical pattern alongside current balance data as a Notion intelligence page — structural usage intelligence married to live financial state.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-06 thirty-fourth-pass. alchemist agent bound (alchemist.agent.chitty.cc); finance agent bound (finance.agent.chitty.cc, Mercury multi-entity); orchestrator/agent_execute confirmed 13 tools on live gateway; notion connected 22 tools. combos.name: obligation-tracker-cashflow-planner-notion
combos.accomplishes: Obligation-tracker surfaces all outstanding financial and legal obligations (rent, loan, dispute liabilities) from ChittyCommand's structured store; cashflow-planner models the cash-flow impact of each obligation against Mercury balances and known income; notion documents the prioritized obligation-vs-cashflow plan — a complete financial-obligation decision-support chain.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 thirty-fifth-pass. chittycommand-alpha:obligation-tracker (execution:mcp) and chittycommand-alpha:cashflow-planner (execution:mcp) both in skill registry. orchestrator/skill_execute confirmed (13 tools). notion 22 tools confirmed.

combos.name: finance-dispute-obligation-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Finance agent pulls Mercury banking transactions and balances for accounts tied to active disputes; dispute agent (now bound, 7 tools) provides case context and tracks dispute-linked liabilities; obligation-tracker records the resulting obligations with amounts, deadlines, and dispute references; notion stores the synthesis as a financial-dispute dashboard — bridging banking state with litigation exposure.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 thirty-fifth-pass. finance agent bound; dispute agent NEWLY BOUND (was unbound in 34th pass, now bound with 7 tools); obligation-tracker skill confirmed; notion 22 tools confirmed. First combo linking finance + dispute agents.

combos.name: claude-opus-migration-finance-architecture

combos.notes: migration:claude-opus-migration confirmed via skill_execute (2026-06-06). chittyos-finance:mercury-finance confirmed as mcp-execution skill (finance.agent.chitty.cc). notion/API-post-page verified. combos.name: cashflow-dispute-strategy-obligation
combos.accomplishes: Run cash flow analysis, feed the result into dispute strategy to identify financially material claims, then track resulting obligations — a full cross-domain financial dispute setup chain.
combos.notes: All three chittycommand-alpha skills confirmed via skill_execute returning action:local_invoke (2026-06-06). notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.notes: mercury-finance confirmed via skill_execute (execution: mcp). dispute-intake confirmed as chittycommand-alpha MCP skill. notion/API-post-page verified.

Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — all Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-06 thirty-fourth-pass. mcp-dev:build-mcp-server skill in registry (execution:local); orchestrator/skill_execute confirmed (13 tools); playwright 23 tools confirmed; notion 22 tools confirmed. First use of mcp-dev:build-mcp-server skill in design profile.

combos.name: cast-intent-design-playwright-notion
combos.accomplishes: ch1tty/cast routes a design-mode intent through the registry (focus=design lens biases toward design and browser-automation tools), resolving to the best-fit tool for the design task (frontend-design skill, browser-rendering, or playwright); playwright captures the resulting UI surface as a screenshot for design review; notion stores the screenshot and design decision rationale — cast as the intent-routing entry point for design work.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 thirty-fifth-pass. ch1tty/cast is one of the 5 live meta-tools; playwright 23 tools confirmed; notion 22 tools confirmed. First combo demonstrating cast as the design-workflow entry point with focus=design lens active.

combos.name: review-pr-frontend-design-audit
combos.accomplishes: Run the multi-agent PR review on frontend code changes (testing visual regressions, component structure, type safety), invoke the frontend-design skill to generate a production-grade design improvement brief for the changed UI surfaces, then take a Playwright screenshot for visual reference.
combos.notes: pr-review:review-pr and claude-official:frontend-design confirmed via orchestrator/skill_execute (2026-06-06). playwright/screenshot verified. First combo linking PR review → frontend design brief → visual screenshot — full frontend quality loop.

combos.name: dispute-evidence-playwright-fact-governance
combos.accomplishes: Collect and organize dispute evidence, take browser screenshots as visual proof, record them as verified facts through the fact-governance lifecycle, and persist to Notion.
combos.notes: dispute-evidence confirmed as chittycommand-alpha MCP skill. playwright/screenshot confirmed via playwright server. fact-governance confirmed via chittyos-legal. notion/API-post-page verified.

prompts.text: Screenshot chitty.cc, save it locally, and add it to my Notion design board
Open the broken checkout page in a browser, snapshot it, and file a GitHub bug with the repro
Convert the competitor's pricing page to markdown and save it to my references folder
Test the signup form on staging and save a screenshot proving it submits
Grab the HTML of this landing page, check what UI framework it uses, and write up an implementation note in Notion
Take a full-page screenshot of my portfolio site
Screenshot this design URL and ingest it as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI
Navigate to the staging site, snapshot the design, and create a tracked task for any issues found
Navigate to this design URL, take a screenshot, and post it to Notion for team review
Convert this page to markdown, reason over its design patterns, and write a brief in Notion
Screenshot the landing page and save it as a visual archive
Navigate to the app, take a screenshot after login, and save the proof
Navigate to this URL, take an accessibility snapshot, reason about UX issues, and document the audit in Notion
Fetch the HTML of this page, analyse the DOM structure, and save the analysis to a file
Screenshot this page and analyze its visual design hierarchy
Navigate to this page, click the signup button, and analyze the interaction flow
Find a UI agent and capture a Playwright snapshot of its interface for design review
Navigate to the UI, screenshot it, search for UX requirements in evidence, and reason about design quality
Navigate to this page, take an accessibility snapshot of its content, then find and execute the best skill to act on what you found there

Use the ChatGPT agent for design template context then scaffold a production frontend with the frontend-design skill

Queue a browser scrape job, capture screenshots and render PDFs of target pages with playwright and browser-rendering, and save the design corpus to Notion

code.description: Software development — source control, deployment, library documentation, database, and code quality tools. github NOT connected — library-docs-to-github-issue is verified:false. neon NOT connected — schema/db combos are verified:false. Notion API returning 401 in remote container — Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: library-research-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its canonical context7 ID, fetch the current API documentation, and write a usage note into Notion — turning live library docs into a durable, searchable implementation reference.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). context7/resolve-library-id, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: schema-branch-and-migrate
combos.accomplishes: Create a Neon database branch for a schema change, apply the migration SQL, then describe the resulting table schema to confirm the change landed — a safe non-destructive schema migration workflow on a throwaway branch.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true. Re-enable when NEON_API_KEY is available.

combos.name: schema-to-notion-doc
combos.accomplishes: Pull the current schema for a Neon table and write it as a Notion documentation page — keeping your data-model docs in sync with the live database without manual copy-paste.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: library-docs-to-github-issue
combos.accomplishes: Look up the latest docs for a library dependency, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the relevant API details — grounding an implementation task in current, accurate documentation rather than stale memory.
combos.notes: context7 verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: code-search-and-file-context
combos.accomplishes: Use Serena's code-intelligence search to locate a symbol or pattern across the workspace, then read the full file context around the match — a semantic-then-deep drill-down that avoids scanning files blindly.
combos.notes: serena not connected (lazy, requires token). fs/read_text_file verified live.

combos.name: db-branch-test-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Branch the database, run a test query or migration against the branch, then write the outcome into a Notion page — a lightweight experiment-then-document pattern for database changes.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: workers-deploy-and-verify
combos.accomplishes: Upload a new Cloudflare Worker script and immediately fetch it back to verify the deployment landed correctly — a tight deploy→verify loop before any downstream tests run.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected (remote endpoint, requires token). Tool names inferred from cloudflare MCP surface.

combos.name: linear-issue-to-github-pr
combos.accomplishes: List Linear issues assigned to the current sprint, then open a GitHub pull request for each — keeping issue tracking and code review in sync without manual cross-tool copy-paste.
combos.notes: linear requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp. github NOT connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: linear-bug-to-library-context
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Linear bug report, resolve the affected library via Context7, and load the library's API docs — giving a developer immediate reference context to reproduce and fix the issue without leaving the terminal.
combos.notes: linear inferred (auth required); context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs verified.

combos.name: context7-docs-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name, fetch its current API documentation, and write the result to a local file for offline reference or inclusion in a project's docs folder — a verified three-backend chain spanning docs-resolution + filesystem persistence.
combos.notes: context7 and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Cast: 'research library docs and save to local file' resolves to context7/resolve-library-id (score 0.31) with fs alternatives confirmed in resolution path. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: fs-survey-and-document
combos.accomplishes: List the top-level project directory contents, reason over the structure with sequential-thinking to identify architectural patterns or concerns, and write a technical architecture note into Notion — a codebase-to-doc pipeline using locally-available backends. Note: fs/list_directory covers one path at a time; enumerate subdirectories separately for deeper coverage.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05); list_directory is single-level (not recursive). fs/list_directory, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: evidence-library-cross-ref
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art on a library or technology decision, then pull the current API documentation for the same library — correlating historical ChittyOS usage patterns with live upstream docs to ground implementation choices.
combos.notes: evidence and context7 both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run — spans two different backends not previously combined in catalog. No prior evidence+context7 chain existed. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: docs-to-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its Context7 ID, retrieve authoritative docs and code examples, then pass the documentation through sequential thinking to plan an integration, pick the right API, or reason through a technical decision — context7 + thinking two-backend chain.
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs confirmed via live cast probes. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed at score 0.8 in reasoning cast (2026-06-04 third pass). Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: codebase-architecture-report
combos.accomplishes: Survey a codebase directory structure, read key source files, reason about architectural patterns and technical debt, write a structured architecture report to file
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). Uses read_text_file not deprecated read_file. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification.

combos.name: evidence-library-research
combos.accomplishes: Search RAG evidence for project-specific context, resolve and fetch authoritative library documentation for the relevant tool/framework, save combined research findings to file
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (evidence, context7, fs). Extends existing evidence-library-cross-ref with a file output step. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification.

combos.name: search-to-library-docs
combos.accomplishes: Search the codebase for files matching a pattern to identify which library is in use, then resolve its canonical context7 ID and fetch current API documentation — connecting a code scan directly to authoritative library reference.
combos.notes: All 3 steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/search_files (score 0.67), context7/resolve-library-id (0.67), context7/query-docs (0.75). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: tree-to-architecture-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Get a full recursive JSON tree view of the project, then use sequential thinking to reason through the architecture — identifying module boundaries, dependency patterns, and structural concerns.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/directory_tree (score 0.50), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: build-log-lib-docs-research
combos.accomplishes: Pull build logs for a failing Workers build, identify the broken dependency by name, resolve its library ID via context7, fetch the current docs, reason over the fix approach, then write a remediation plan — connecting the CI failure signal directly to authoritative library docs.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected (auth-gated). context7 available (npx, no auth) but lazy. Highest-value cloudflare-builds+code combo: routes a build failure directly into library documentation research.

combos.name: linear-issue-codebase-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Linear issue's full description and metadata, search the local codebase for relevant files matching the issue keywords, read the most relevant ones, reason over the implementation approach or root cause, then write a structured analysis — grounding issue-driven work in actual code context.
combos.notes: linear not connected (auth-gated). fs and thinking available locally. Tightest linear+codebase combo: issue context pulls code context pulls reasoning.

combos.name: library-docs-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library or framework name to its context7 library ID, query current documentation and code examples, reason over the relevant API surface and design patterns with sequential thinking, then write a structured technical summary to a local file — turning on-demand library research into a persistent, queryable reference.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 tenth-pass cast probes: context7/resolve-library-id (1.10), context7/query-docs (0.90 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83 as alternative). Extends search-to-library-docs (ends at query-docs) with reasoning + file output. context7 available via npx (lazy spawn, no auth required). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-evidence-cross-reference
combos.accomplishes: Fetch the full HTML content of a web page via Cloudflare browser rendering, run an AI-powered semantic search against the evidence base to find related documents and prior research, reason over the combined web context and evidence with sequential thinking to surface insights or gaps, then write a structured cross-reference report to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: browser-rendering/get_url_html_content (0.6), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). Cross-domain: browser-rendering plus evidence plus thinking plus fs, 4 distinct backends. No auth-gated backends required NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: repo-size-profile-report
combos.accomplishes: Survey a repository directory listing with sizes, reason about large artifacts, bloated directories, and cleanup opportunities, write a storage profile and priority cleanup report — uses the size-aware directory listing for targeted analysis
combos.notes: fs/list_directory_with_sizes confirmed live (returned directory listing with sizes) 2026-06-05; thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed live this pass

combos.name: library-to-skill-integration-guide
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library ID, fetch its documentation and code examples, search ecosystem skills that compose with or use that library, write an integration guide linking library usage to ChittyOS capabilities — cross-domain: documents + ecosystem + desktop
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs confirmed live 2026-06-05; orchestrator/skill_search confirmed live (cast score 0.76); fs/write_file confirmed live; novel 4-backend chain spanning documents+ecosystem+desktop categories

combos.name: size-aware-architecture-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Survey directory sizes to identify heavy modules and storage hot-spots, then get recursive tree structure for full architectural context, reason about bloat, refactor priorities, and dependency weight — size-aware complement to tree-to-architecture-thinking
combos.notes: fs/list_directory_with_sizes and fs/directory_tree both confirmed live via cast (score 0.66) 2026-06-05; thinking confirmed live; distinct from tree-to-architecture-thinking by leading with size data before tree

combos.name: code-file-quality-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Search source files by pattern, read a key file, analyze code quality patterns with sequential reasoning, then write a findings report — a 4-step chain that adds targeted file read and written output to the existing search→think pattern.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: fs/search_files (0.42), fs/read_text_file (0.36), thinking/sequentialthinking, fs/write_file (0.30). Novel: 4-step chain not in catalog; adds file read + output vs existing 2-step search→think.

combos.name: library-search-to-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Search codebase for library import patterns, resolve the library in context7, fetch current documentation, then reason about upgrade paths or usage best practices — extends the existing search-to-library-docs chain with a reasoning step.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: fs/search_files (0.42), context7/resolve-library-id (0.50), context7/query-docs (confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed). Novel: adds reasoning over existing search-to-library-docs 3-step chain.

combos.name: code-review-skill-fs-chain
combos.accomplishes: Search the skill registry for the code-review skill, read the target source file from the local filesystem, then invoke the skill for a structured code quality review — a three-backend chain spanning skill discovery, file I/O, and orchestrated execution.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 sixteenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_search returned code-review (claude-official plugin, 0.8 relevance); fs/read_text_file confirmed; orchestrator/skill_execute returned action:local_invoke for chittyos-devops:chitty-health (same action path). First use of skill_search+fs+skill_execute in a single code-review chain.

combos.name: skill-deploy-context7-docs
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyOS skill registry for a deployment skill (e.g. chitty-deploy, wrangler-audit), then immediately resolve the target platform's library and fetch its current documentation — grounding the skill's execution context in authoritative upstream docs. Skill-first complement to library-to-skill-integration-guide (which starts with library lookup).
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 seventeenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_search returned chitty-deploy (0.8) and wrangler-audit (0.8) for 'deploy workers wrangler'; context7/resolve-library-id returned /modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk with high benchmark; context7/query-docs returned transport connection snippets. First orchestrator/skill_search→context7 chain in catalog — reverse of library-to-skill-integration-guide direction.

combos.name: evidence-skill-library-docs
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art on a technical decision or library choice, find the ChittyOS skill most relevant to acting on those findings, resolve the library's canonical ID in context7, then fetch the live documentation — a four-backend discovery chain that bridges historical evidence, ecosystem skills, and authoritative upstream docs.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 seventeenth-pass. evidence/ai_search confirmed; orchestrator/skill_search returned compliance/deploy skills; context7/resolve-library-id + context7/query-docs confirmed. Fixed in review: chain originally stopped at resolve-library-id (incomplete). Distinct from evidence-library-cross-ref (evidence→context7 directly, no orchestrator skill step) and evidence-library-research (adds fs write). First four-step chain spanning evidence+orchestrator+context7.

combos.name: agent-search-library-docs
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyAgent registry for the specialized agent handling a specific service or domain (e.g. neon agent, cloudflare agent, dispute agent), then immediately resolve that service's library ID in context7 and fetch its API documentation — connecting agent discovery to authoritative SDK reference.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 seventeenth-pass. orchestrator/agent_search returned dispute (0.7), storage (0.4) for governance query; context7/resolve-library-id confirmed; context7/query-docs confirmed. Distinct from skill-deploy-context7-docs (which uses skill_search not agent_search). First agent_search→context7 chain in catalog.

combos.name: evidence-context7-skill-integration
combos.accomplishes: Full tech-to-skill synthesis — search evidence for technology context, look up the relevant library docs from Context7, then surface ChittyOS skills suited to integrate that technology, and write the integration guide. Novel ordering: evidence first, then docs, then skill discovery.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: evidence/ai_search (0.48 score), context7/resolve-library-id (0.36 score confirmed), context7/query-docs (confirmed via prior sessions), skill_search (0.36 score confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). Differs from evidence-skill-library-docs (evidence→skill_search→context7) by placing context7 lookup between evidence and skill discovery.

combos.name: context7-evidence-skill-code-brief
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library's Context7 ID, fetch implementation docs and examples, cross-reference the evidence knowledge base for domain constraints or prior art, surface the full skill registry to find relevant execution hooks, and write a combined code brief — three distinct knowledge sources (library docs, evidence, skill registry) synthesized in one pass.
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id (direct execute 2026-06-05, TypeScript resolved), context7/query-docs (cast score 0.80 confirmed), evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), orchestrator/skill_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 54 skills confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). Novel: first chain combining context7 library docs + evidence cross-reference + skill_list — three distinct knowledge sources; no prior combo chains all three.

combos.name: directory-evidence-skill-docs
combos.accomplishes: Map the codebase directory structure, cross-reference with the evidence base for architectural context, find the most relevant skill for the codebase pattern, then pull library documentation. Four-category cross: desktop (fs) + search (evidence) + reasoning (orchestrator) + documents (context7) — codebase analysis enriched by all three external knowledge sources.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: fs/directory_tree (confirmed in prior passes, tree-to-architecture-thinking); evidence/ai_search (confirmed this session); skill_search confirmed (multiple skills returned); context7/resolve-library-id (0.8 score confirmed); context7/query-docs confirmed. Novel: first code chain to combine directory_tree → evidence → skill_search → context7 docs — prior chains use directory_tree with thinking only (tree-to-architecture-thinking) or sizes+tree+thinking, never branching into evidence+skill+library docs. Four distinct backend categories crossed in single chain.

combos.name: ch1tty-self-discovery-docs
combos.accomplishes: Meta-recursive self-discovery: ch1tty searches for itself in the agent registry (chittyagent-ch1tty, mcp-gateway capability), then finds its own cast skill in the skill registry, then fetches its own MCP SDK docs via context7 — producing a self-referential architecture document: 'what am I, what can I cast, and what does the SDK I'm built on say about my primitives?'
combos.notes: agent_search('ch1tty gateway mcp aggregation') → chittyagent-ch1tty (0.7 relevance, mcp-gateway capability, unbound status) confirmed. skill_search('cast mcp route orchestration intent') → user:cast (0.8 relevance) confirmed. context7 resolve-library-id + query-docs confirmed in prior passes. Novel: first meta-recursive chain where ch1tty discovers ITSELF via its own orchestrator, then its own cast skill, then its underlying SDK — a self-knowledge chain.

combos.name: helper-architectural-nav-docs
combos.accomplishes: Discover the helper agent (self-evolving architectural navigator — answers 'which service handles X?' via intent classification + registry search + learning), find the registry management skill, then look up and query MCP library documentation via Context7, and save an architectural context guide that pairs service discovery with library docs.
combos.notes: FIRST combo to use helper agent as entry point. agent_search('helper architectural navigation service discovery intent classification') → chittyagent-helper (0.7 relevance, service-discovery + architectural-navigation + intent-classification, bound) confirmed 2026-06-05. chitty-register (0.8 relevance) confirmed. context7/resolve-library-id confirmed (resolves MCP TypeScript SDK). context7/query-docs confirmed. fs/write_file confirmed. Cross-category: ecosystem (orchestrator) + code (context7) + desktop (fs).

combos.name: registry-agent-skill-mcp-docs
combos.accomplishes: Use the registry agent as the entry point into the ChittyOS certified service catalog, pair it with the registry management skill, then ground the code context with MCP library documentation from Context7, and save a registry-aware integration guide. Ideal for developers building new MCP surfaces that need to register with ChittyOS.
combos.notes: Pairs registry agent (0.7) + chitty-register skill (0.8) + context7 library docs — a registry-first code workflow. All confirmed 2026-06-05. Distinct from helper-architectural-nav-docs: starts with registry (read-only directory) vs helper (active navigational service); registry is the catalog, helper is the reasoning layer. Both use context7 for docs but via different discovery paths.

combos.name: pr-review-skill-context7-brief
combos.accomplishes: Find the pr-review:review-pr skill (comprehensive PR review with specialized agents), execute the PR review, look up the relevant library documentation via context7, and write a code review brief — a five-step code-quality chain that combines skill-driven automated review with authoritative library reference.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. orchestrator/skill_search('code review deploy build') returned pr-review:review-pr (0.47 relevance, pr-review-toolkit plugin); skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; context7/resolve-library-id (confirmed); context7/query-docs (confirmed); fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first use of pr-review:review-pr skill in catalog; first chain pairing a PR review skill with library documentation lookup.

combos.name: autobot-ship-deploy
combos.accomplishes: Discover the autobot agent (autonomous feature-orchestration, canonical-workflow, ship-automation), find the ship agent (dev-wrap-up, preflight-checks, branch-management), locate the chitty-deploy skill for deploying ChittyOS services, execute the deployment, then verify the Worker is listed in Cloudflare Workers — confirming the deployment artifact exists. Note: cloudflare/list_workers confirms Worker presence, not build pipeline success/failure; use cloudflare-builds/workers_builds_list_builds for build-run verification.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. agent_search('autobot autonomous feature ship merge pull request') returned chittyagent-autobot (0.7 relevance, feature-orchestration+canonical-workflow+ship-automation) and chittyagent-ship (0.7, dev-wrap-up+preflight-checks); skill_search returned chittyos-devops:chitty-deploy (0.8); skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; cloudflare/list_workers confirmed in prior catalog sessions. Novel: first use of chittyagent-autobot in catalog; first chain combining two agent discoveries + skill execution + Cloudflare verification. NOTE: cloudflare not connected in current environment (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation from prior catalog sessions, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: agents-sdk-migration-plan
combos.accomplishes: Find the agents-sdk-migrate skill (evaluate and migrate Cloudflare Workers to Agents SDK), execute the skill evaluation, look up the Cloudflare Agents SDK documentation via context7, reason about migration feasibility, complexity, and approach with sequential thinking, and write a structured migration plan — a six-step code modernization chain.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. skill_search('agent sdk migrate cloudflare workers agents') returned chittyos-devops:agents-sdk-migrate (0.7 relevance, chittyos-devops plugin); skill_execute returned action:local_invoke (/agents-sdk-migrate); context7 (confirmed); thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed); fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first use of chittyos-devops:agents-sdk-migrate skill in catalog; first 6-tool code chain combining devops skill + library docs + reasoning.

combos.name: scrape-playwright-automation-docs
combos.accomplishes: Discover the scrape agent (browser automation job queue with retries and exponential backoff), probe its live status, then pull Playwright MCP documentation via context7 to understand the browser automation primitives the scrape agent orchestrates — producing an implementation brief for a scraping pipeline backed by real MCP SDK patterns.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. agent_search('scrape browser automation job queue headless') returned chittyagent-scrape (0.7 relevance, bound status, web-scraping+browser-automation+job-queue); agent_execute('scrape', 'status') returned {action:'executed', http_status:404} confirming the agent is bound and routes correctly; context7/resolve-library-id('playwright') returned /microsoft/playwright.dev (benchmark 92.5, 16311 snippets, High reputation); fs/write_file routes confirmed. Novel: FIRST use of chittyagent-scrape in catalog.

combos.name: scrape-resolve-error-triage-pipeline
combos.accomplishes: Surface the scrape job queue agent, probe its live status to capture any error state, then discover the resolve agent (automated error triage — evaluates payloads, classifies severity, determines action), reason over the complementary pipeline (scrape fails → resolve triages → action), and write a structured error-triage runbook for browser automation failures.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. agent_search('scrape') → chittyagent-scrape (0.7, bound); agent_execute('scrape','status') → {action:'executed', http_status:404} (bound, routes); agent_search('resolve error triage severity classification') → chittyagent-resolve (0.7, unbound, error-triage+severity-classification+auto-resolution); thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: FIRST use of chittyagent-resolve in catalog; first scrape+resolve compound for browser-automation error pipeline.

combos.name: ship-then-branch-cleanup
